iree_add_all_subdirs()

iree_py_library(
  NAME
    core
  SRCS
    "abi.py"
    "context.py"
    "converter.py"
    "coverage.py"
    "model.py"
    "nodes.py"
    "types.py"
  DEPS
    iree::runtime::py::loom::core
    iree::runtime::py::loom::package
    iree::runtime::py::loom::importers::core::core
)

iree_py_library(
  NAME
    tilelang
  SRCS
    "__init__.py"
    "defaults.py"
    "importer.py"
  DEPS
    iree::runtime::py::loom::importers::tilelang::core
    iree::runtime::py::loom::importers::tilelang::ops::ops
)

iree_py_library(
  NAME
    tilelang_packages
)

if(LOOM_IMPORTER_TILELANG)

iree_py_test(
  NAME
    tilelang_test
  SRCS
    "../../tools/pytest_style_runner.py"
  ARGS
    "loom.importers.tilelang.context_test"
    "loom.importers.tilelang.coverage_test"
    "loom.importers.tilelang.types_test"
  PACKAGE_DIRS
    "${IREE_SOURCE_DIR}/runtime/py"
    "${IREE_BINARY_DIR}/runtime/py"
)

add_custom_command(OUTPUT import_tests.stamp
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E touch import_tests.stamp
  DEPENDS
    "testdata/allocations.py"
    "testdata/analysis.py"
    "testdata/control_flow.py"
    "testdata/diagnostics.py"
    "testdata/lowered_metadata.py"
    "testdata/memory_effects.py"
    "testdata/scalar_calls.py"
    "testdata/tilekernels/engram.py"
    "testdata/tilekernels/mhc.py"
    "testdata/tilekernels/moe_expand.py"
    "testdata/tilekernels/moe_gate.py"
    "testdata/tilekernels/moe_histogram.py"
    "testdata/tilekernels/moe_normalize.py"
    "testdata/tilekernels/moe_routing.py"
    "testdata/tilekernels/transpose.py"
    "testdata/tileops.py"
    "testdata/topology.py"
    "testdata/vector_arithmetic.py"
    "testdata/vector_casts.py"
    "testdata/vector_memory.py"
)

add_custom_target(import_tests
    DEPENDS import_tests.stamp
)

iree_py_test(
  NAME
    tilelang_import_test
  SRCS
    "../check/import_test.py"
  ARGS
    "tilelang"
    "--fail-on-skip"
    "--loom-opt=$<TARGET_FILE:loom_src_loom_tools_loom-opt_loom-opt>"
    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/py/loom/importers/tilelang/testdata/allocations.py"
    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/py/loom/importers/tilelang/testdata/analysis.py"
    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/py/loom/importers/tilelang/testdata/control_flow.py"
